_description: Project-local Agency-to-Structure Engine instances in this repo. SDE_Extraction starts research-heavy (sde-extraction-dev is the live instance). A placeholder app instance (sde-extraction-app) is pre-laid so the structure is ready when the deployed app surface materializes; its configs are stubs marked PLACEHOLDER.

instances.where_it_runs: Inside Claude Code sessions when Liz opens this repo for research or development work
instances.boundary: MUST NOT share product/user memory with the -app instance without explicit safe routing (when -app activates).

instances.status: placeholder — not yet active; configs are stubs marked PLACEHOLDER
instances.where_it_runs: TBD — Render web service / Vercel / etc. when the website + backend get built
instances.adapter: TBD — product-shaped adapter, decided when the research surfaces a product shape
watches: TBD — depends on the product the research drives toward
instances.boundary: MUST NOT share dev/research memory with the -dev instance without explicit safe routing. Same hard boundary rule as the Hub's two-instance pattern.

registration_status.sde-extraction-app: deferred — register when the deployed app is being built

activation_note: The -app instance's configs are PLACEHOLDER stubs. They establish the file structure and the boundary rule. Populate with real values when the deployed app surface is being built — at that point the research will have surfaced a product shape, and the configs can be filled with informed choices instead of TBDs.
